parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'Markdown', reply_markup: $json.keyboard ? { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } : undefined }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'Markdown', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Parse Callback Data').item.json.chat_id, category_id: $('Parse Callback Data').item.json.cb_uuid, state: 'awaiting_name', full_name: null, nim: null, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Parse Callback Data').item.json.chat_id, text: '📝 Kategori dipilih! Sekarang ketik *nama lengkap* kamu:', parse_mode: 'Markdown' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'Markdown', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ full_name: $json.text, state: 'awaiting_nim', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Extract Session Row').item.json.chat_id, text: '🎓 Nama tersimpan! Sekarang ketik *NIM* kamu\n_(Jika bukan mahasiswa, ketik: `-`)_', parse_mode: 'Markdown' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ nim: $json.text === '-' ? null : $json.text, state: 'awaiting_email', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Extract Session Row').item.json.chat_id, text: '📧 NIM tersimpan! Sekarang ketik *email aktif* kamu\n_(Kode booking akan dikirim ke email ini)_', parse_mode: 'Markdown' }) }}

nodes.name: Extract Student ID + Build Booking Code

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.chat_id, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: '🎉 Pendaftaran Berhasil!\n\n' + '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n' + '🎫 BOOKING KONFIRMASI\n' + '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n' + '👤 Nama: ' + $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.full_name + '\n' + '📧 Email: ' + $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.email + '\n' + '🎟️ Kode Booking: ' + $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.booking_code + '\n\n' + '⚠️ Screenshot atau catat kode ini. Tunjukkan saat check-in.\n\n' + 'Sampai jumpa di acara! 🚀' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, parse_mode: 'Markdown', text: '👋 Halo! Ketik /start untuk memulai pendaftaran workshop.' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Config Credential').item.json.chat_id, parse_mode: 'Markdown', text: '🔄 Pendaftaran dibatalkan.\n\nKetik /start untuk memulai ulang.' }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '✅ Booking Dikonfirmasi — ' + $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.booking_code }}
parameters.html:
=

🎉 Pendaftaran Berhasil!

BOOKING KONFIRMASI

👤 Nama: {{ $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.full_name }}
📧 Email: {{ $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.email }}
🎟️ Kode Booking Anda:
{{ $('Extract Booking Result').item.json.booking_code }}
